generated_oml:
instance BCSSensors : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors within Building Control System (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiveOperationalData
]

instance LiveOperationalData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom BCSSensors
    DTDFVocab:fromData RealTimePhysicalData
]

instance RealTimePhysicalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time operational data from physical building systems"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiveOperationalData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange platform for IoT devices"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimePhysicalData
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeInsightsService
]

instance Ditto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Digital Twin management platform for IoT device connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimePhysicalData
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeInsightsService
]

instance UnrealEngine : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization engine for immersive monitoring and control"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GeometricModel
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationInsight
]

instance MDE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-Driven Engineering process for transforming enriched BIM models into structured digital artifacts"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIM, AnalyticalModel, BehavioralModel
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeInsightsService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, OptimizationService, SimulationService
]

instance BIM : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Semantic backbone for structured data representation in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDE
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric modeling for spatial layout of building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo UnrealEngine
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral modeling for control logic of Building Control System (BCS) components"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, Ditto
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical models via modular custom services for operational analytics"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MDE
]

instance RealTimeInsightsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Provides real-time insights for data-driven infrastructure management in AECO domain"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight, AnalyticsInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables predictive analytics for infrastructure management"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveInsight
]

instance OptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supports optimization of building operations through simulation and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimizationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables simulation capabilities for building lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization interface for monitoring and control of physical infrastructure"
]

instance AnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analytics capabilities enabled by integrated custom services via standardized extension points"
]

instance PredictiveInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for infrastructure management"
]

instance OptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of building operations through simulation and analysis"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation capabilities for building lifecycle management"
]

instance AECOEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Environment for infrastructure assets in AECO domain"
    base:contains BuildingControlEngineers, FacilityManagers, DTEngineers, DTFramework
]

instance BuildingControlEngineers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for device modeling and deployment"
]

instance FacilityManagers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for real-time monitoring and control"
]

instance DTEngineers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Role for service integration"
]

instance DTFramework : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Centralized coordination hub for DT instances"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The framework facilitates bidirectional communication between virtual and physical assets by feeding control signals back to the Building Control System (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensuring continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized DT Framework orchestrating components through modular architecture and standardized extension points, facilitating bidirectional data exchange and holistic building lifecycle management via runtime configuration management"
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle encompasses initial device modeling in BIM where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to establish a unified semantic foundation; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to extract structured representations and automatically generate deployable DT artifacts; runtime operation with real-time data exchange for synchronization between physical and digital twins, interactive visualization for monitoring and control; and modular integration of custom services and analytics via standardized extension points for evolving operational needs. Lifecycle transitions are automated with minimal manual intervention, and governance is managed through role-based responsibilities of Building Control Engineers, Facility Managers, and DT Engineers."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The framework integrates Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange and utilizes relevant middleware metadata for Hono and Ditto."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Nonfunctional requirements (NF_X) address interoperability across heterogeneous systems to ensure compatibility and data exchange between disparate technologies and platforms."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with AECO-specific standards including Building Information Modeling (BIM) for semantic modeling, and implementation of standardized extension points to ensure interoperability and service integration within the Digital Twin framework."
]
